evals.name: full-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring applying all React Native skill rules

assertions.trap: createStackNavigator + useNavigation from @react-navigation/native
assertions.description: Use Expo Router file-based navigation instead of React Navigation stack

assertions.trap: navigation.navigate('Profile', { userId: '42' }) with string route names
assertions.description: Use Expo Router typed routes: router.push('/profile/[id]') with useLocalSearchParams<{ id: string }>()

assertions.trap: Auth token stored in AsyncStorage
assertions.description: Auth tokens must use SecureStore, not AsyncStorage

assertions.trap: API_KEY = 'sk-proj-abc123secret' hardcoded in source
assertions.description: No secrets in code — use SecureStore or env config

assertions.trap: fetch() called directly in ProfileScreen render body
assertions.description: No fetch calls in render — use useEffect or React Query

assertions.trap: FlatList used for the posts feed
assertions.description: Use FlashList over FlatList for long lists

assertions.trap: Inline arrow function in renderItem, not extracted or memoized
assertions.description: Extract renderItem as named component wrapped in React.memo

assertions.trap: Inline style objects on every View/TouchableOpacity/Text in SettingsScreen and FeedScreen
assertions.description: Use StyleSheet.create for all styles, never inline objects

assertions.trap: Animated.timing from react-native Animated API
assertions.description: Use Reanimated for 60fps native-thread animations instead of RN Animated

assertions.trap: TouchableOpacity onPress handlers with no haptic feedback
assertions.description: Always add haptic feedback (expo-haptics) on user interactions

assertions.trap: No error boundary wrapping any screen or feature
assertions.description: Error boundaries required at feature level

assertions.trap: navigation.navigate('Home') after login instead of replace
assertions.description: Use router.replace() after login to prevent back navigation to login screen

assertions.trap: getExpoPushTokenAsync called without requestPermissionsAsync
assertions.description: Request and check notification permissions before getting push token

assertions.trap: getExpoPushTokenAsync() called without projectId parameter
assertions.description: Pass projectId to getExpoPushTokenAsync({ projectId })

assertions.trap: No setNotificationHandler configured for foreground notifications
assertions.description: Configure Notifications.setNotificationHandler for foreground display

assertions.trap: No useLastNotificationResponse to handle notification taps
assertions.description: Handle notification tap with useLastNotificationResponse + navigate

assertions.trap: app.json missing scheme field
assertions.description: Configure scheme in app.json for deep linking: { expo: { scheme: 'myapp' } }

assertions.trap: Deep link path and queryParams passed directly to navigate without validation
assertions.description: Always validate deep link params before navigation

assertions.trap: {count && <Text>} renders 0 when posts is empty
assertions.description: Never use && with potentially falsy numbers — use count > 0 &&

assertions.trap: {item.body} rendered as bare string outside <Text> component
assertions.description: Always wrap raw strings in <Text> — bare strings crash on native

assertions.trap: Image source is a bare string instead of { uri: string }
assertions.description: Remote image source must be { uri: string }, not a bare string

assertions.trap: import from '@testing-library/react' instead of react-native variant
assertions.description: Use @testing-library/react-native for component tests, not @testing-library/react
